response.justification: James has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, fluent assertions), and a proven track record of open-source contributions and knowledge sharing, but lacks clear evidence of people management experience and mobile platform expertise, which are core to the role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators)
Proven track record of open-source contributions and technical mentorship via workshops
Broad technical stack including mobile (iOS/TV), build systems, and cross-platform tooling
concerns: No explicit evidence of 2+ years in people management or team leadership
Limited documentation of mobile platform ecosystem experience beyond iOS app maintenance
No mention of strategic roadmap planning or organizational change leadership
